title: Cycle observe — task categories and forbidden auto-actions (policy only)
law: Observation tower and safe task organizer only. This JSON does not execute tasks.

task_categories.meaning: Read registries/reports; summarize; no writes except cycle observe reports.
Operator or CI runs allowlisted npm scripts that only refresh reports or lint.
Human-authored doc or manifest alignment proposed from drift; no auto-apply.
Apply paths that touch satellites, workspace, or governance — AMK/human gate required.
No automation without explicit charter and hub gates.

turtle_mode_note: Use branch prefix cursor/zsanctuary/; one domain per PR; this observer never executes the generated queue.
